positive: A symmetrical, centralized arrangement featuring intertwining bioluminescent flora and celestial elements, including stylized crescent moons, constellations, and cosmic dust. The composition must read like an intricate, tattoo-style mandala or botanical diagram. Style: Clean line art, Art Nouveau influence mixed with sacred geometry, high-contrast vector aesthetic. Color Palette: Deep midnight blue and velvety indigo background, accented with matte gold foil effects, luminous teal, and crisp cream. The design should have strong, easily identifiable silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. Composition must fill the frame entirely without negative space borders.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, grainy, watermark, signature, text, writing, messy, bad anatomy, disfigured, out of frame, ugly, noise, jpeg artifacts, painting, photorealism, messy lines
